data.name: rge-playground-redirect.php
data.contents:
<?php
add_action( 'admin_init', function (): void {
	if ( ! isset( $_GET['page'] ) || 'rge-playground-edit' !== $_GET['page'] ) {
		return;
	}

	$demo_pages = get_posts(
		[
			'post_type'      => 'page',
			'post_status'    => 'any',
			'posts_per_page' => 1,
			's'              => 'responsiveGridColumns',
		]
	);

	if ( ! empty( $demo_pages ) ) {
		wp_safe_redirect( get_edit_post_link( $demo_pages[0]->ID, '' ) );
		exit;
	}

	wp_safe_redirect( admin_url( 'edit.php?post_type=page' ) );
	exit;
} );
